args: function global:make { param([Parameter(ValueFromRemainingArguments=$true)]$args); $dir = $PWD.Path; while ($dir) { $shim = Join-Path $dir 'make.cmd'; if (Test-Path $shim) { & $shim @args; return $LASTEXITCODE }; $parent = Split-Path $dir -Parent; if (-not $parent -or $parent -eq $dir) { break }; $dir = $parent }; Write-Error 'make.cmd not found — cd to repo root or use .\make.cmd' }
